rationale: New `src/utils/placesApi.js` exports `geocodeZip(zip)` (fetches `https://api.zippopotam.us/us/${clean}` and parses `place.latitude`/`longitude`/`place name`/`state abbreviation`), `searchNearbyLaundromats(lat, lng, radiusMiles, apiKey)` (POSTs to the legitimate `https://places.googleapis.com/v1/places:searchNearby` endpoint with `X-Goog-Api-Key` header, `X-Goog-FieldMask`, and `includedTypes: ['laundry']` plus a `locationRestriction.circle` of `radiusMiles * 1609.344` meters), and `fetchCompetitorCount({...})` that orchestrates geocode and search. `AddressForm.jsx` adds a `googleApiKey` form field (password input), a `handleFetchCompetitors` async handler that calls `fetchCompetitorCount` and auto-populates `competitorCount` plus optionally `lat`/`lng`/`city`/`state` if previously empty, an `Auto-fill from Google Places` panel with a `Search Laundromats via Google` button (disabled when key/zip missing), and a success or error result region listing the matched laundromats with star ratings. `DemographicCharts.jsx` adds a `competitorPlaces` prop to `CompetitorChart` and renders the fetched names plus ratings under a `Fetched from Google Places` header when present. `DemographicsModule.jsx` threads `formData._competitorPlaces` to `result.competitorPlaces` and into `CompetitorChart`. API endpoints, request schema, and field mask all match the real Places API (New) — no hallucinated symbols.
